_description: Travel & conference submenu options (Issue #468), externalized from actions.gd get_travel_options() (L9, #621). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Submit Paper
actions.description: Submit research paper to a conference (multi-turn review process)

actions.name: Attend Conference
actions.description: [Coming Soon] Travel to present accepted paper or network at a conference -- day-bound scheduling is not available yet
